name: Justt
description: Justt automates chargeback disputes using machine learning to craft evidence packages tailored to each reason code and card network. Its API integrates with PSPs and order systems, and the company operates on a performance-based pricing mod

seo.title: Justt — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Justt: Justt automates chargeback disputes using machine learning to craft evidence packages tailored to each reason code and card network. Its API integrates w

when_to_use: ML-optimized chargeback evidence packaging by reason code
Performance-based chargeback dispute automation for merchants
PSP integration for end-to-end dispute workflow automation
Win rate analytics and ROI reporting for finance teams
Friendly fraud detection to prioritize winnable disputes

pros: ML crafts tailored evidence per reason code
Good API fit with PSPs and order systems
cons: Only helps after disputes are filed
Success rate depends on data quality shared
Pay-per-win model can get expensive on volume
review.verdict: A strong automated disputes option for merchants who want a pay-for-results model over Chargehound.
review.best_for: E-commerce and subscription merchants with steady chargeback volume and clean order data.
review.not_for: Merchants wanting prevention-first tools like Verifi CDRN or Ethoca alerts.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
